title: Game State, Scenes, Pause, Life Loss, Restart, and Ownership · Language Clinic: Pause Semantics
summary: Menus, play, pause, death, and game over are booleans that form impossible combinations; pause leaves timers running; restart retains old projectiles and score. Predict player-visible behavior, state, units, timing, input, rendering, feedback, failure, accessibility, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pause semantics increment in explicit scene and run-lifecycle state machine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case…
objectives: Freeze simulation clocks and dangerous input while keeping menus, status, audio control, and window events responsive.
Define trigger, guard, exit work, entry work, resulting state, and rejected transitions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: asteroids-pause-semantics — Freeze simulation clocks and dangerous input while keeping menus, status, audio control, and window events responsive.
# Evidence: asteroids-worked-asteroids-game-state-scenes-3
# Competency: asteroids-worked-asteroids-game-state-scenes-3.
# Case 5798: a low-power integrated-GPU frame-budget trial.
# Operating constraint: retain player goal, revision, Python, pygame-ce, SDL, fixture, seed, input trace, viewport, and result identity.
# Changed case: cross both screen seams in one update and retain collision and rendering continuity.
def worked_asteroids_game_state_scenes_3(states: int = 6, valid_transitions: int = 9, invalid_transitions: int = 0, pause_freezes_simulation: bool = True, restart_resets_run: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "playerworked3",
        "seed5798",
        "input3dekrow",
        "frameworked35798",
        "state5798worked3",
        "playtest3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if states < 4 or valid_transitions < states:
        return False, states, "state-graph"
    if invalid_transitions > 0:
        return False, invalid_transitions, "illegal-transition"
    if not pause_freezes_simulation:
        return False, valid_transitions, "pause-leak"
    if not restart_resets_run:
        return False, valid_transitions, "restart-leak"
    assert valid_transitions >= states
    return True, valid_transitions, "explicit-scenes"

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-pause-semantics-1ntdoo
# Competency: asteroids-pause-semantics.
# Case 6468: a controller-remapping accessibility review.
# Operating constraint: keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision.
# Changed case: lose window focus while thrust and fire are held, then prove both actions release safely.
def evidence_asteroids_pause_semantics_1ntdoo(states: int = 6, valid_transitions: int = 9, invalid_transitions: int = 0, pause_freezes_simulation: bool = True, restart_resets_run: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1ntdoo = "1ntdoo-oodtn1-6468"
    assert evidence_variant_1ntdoo
    evidence_axes_1ntdoo = (
        "player1ntdoo",
        "seed6468",
        "inputoodtn1",
        "frame1ntdoo6468",
        "state64681ntdoo",
        "playtestoodtn16468",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1ntdoo)) == 6
    if states < 4 or valid_transitions < states:
        return False, states, "state-graph"
    if invalid_transitions > 0:
        return False, invalid_transitions, "illegal-transition"
    if not pause_freezes_simulation:
        return False, valid_transitions, "pause-leak"
    if not restart_resets_run:
        return False, valid_transitions, "restart-leak"
    assert valid_transitions >= states
    return True, valid_transitions, "explicit-scenes"
